name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
eligibility: All landholding farmers' families in the country, subject to certain exclusion criteria related to higher income status.
procedure: Eligible farmers can apply online through the PM-KISAN portal or via local Common Service Centers (CSCs) by providing Aadhar and bank account details.
impact: Direct income support helps in procuring agricultural inputs and managing domestic needs.

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
eligibility: Adult members of any rural household willing to do public work-related unskilled manual work.
procedure: Register at the local Gram Panchayat to obtain a Job Card. Employment is provided within 15 days of application.
impact: Enhances livelihood security in rural areas and creates durable agricultural assets like ponds and wells.

name: Magel Tyala Shettale (Farm Pond Scheme)
coreBenefit: Subsidy up to ₹50,000 for farm pond construction
eligibility: Farmer must own at least 0.60 hectares of land and should not have availed any other farm pond subsidy previously.
procedure: Apply through the Aaple Sarkar DBT portal. Requires land records (7/12 & 8A) and Aadhar linkage.
impact: Improves water availability for protective irrigation, increasing yield during dry spells.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in a notified area, including sharecroppers and tenant farmers.
procedure: Enroll via nearest bank branch, CSC, or online crop insurance portal before the designated cutoff date for Kharif/Rabi seasons.
impact: Provides financial support in the event of failure of crops due to natural calamities, pests & diseases.

name: Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Krushi Swavalamban Yojana
coreBenefit: Financial assistance for new wells and pumpsets
eligibility: SC/ST farmers with an annual income below ₹1.5 Lakhs and landholding between 0.20 to 6 Hectares.
procedure: Submit applications online on the MahaDBT portal with caste certificate and land holding documents.
impact: Enhances irrigation facilities specifically for marginalized communities, promoting self-reliance.
